Theorem syl2anc 593
Description: Syllogism inference combined with contraction. (Contributed by NM, 16-Mar-2012.)
Hypotheses
Ref Expression
syl2anc.1 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝜓)
syl2anc.2 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝜒)
syl2anc.3 ⊢ ((𝜓 ∧ 𝜒) → 𝜃)
Assertion
Ref Expression
syl2anc ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝜃)
Proof of Theorem syl2anc
StepHypRef Expression
1 syl2anc.1 . 2 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝜓)
2 syl2anc.2 . 2 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝜒)
3 syl2anc.3 . . 3 ⊢ ((𝜓 ∧ 𝜒) → 𝜃)
43ex 416 . 2 ⊢ (𝜓 → (𝜒 → 𝜃))
51, 2, 4sylc 65 1 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝜃)
Colors of variables: wff setvar class
Syntax hints:   → wi 4   ∧ wa 399
